programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara mengenai topik- topik hangat yang akan diperbincangkan dalam keadaan yang kasual.

programme.title: Cia Cia Cia… Gelanggang Bersemut
programme.desc: Diilhamkan dari 'Korean group dating', Sekumpulan 3 selebriti lelaki dan 3 wanita, mereka akan mengharungi pelbagai cabaran romantik. Pemenang lelaki akan memenangi gelaran 'Boyfriend Material'

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 6
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 10
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagha 3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Kembali dengan musim baru, dengan memberi kelainan dan nafas baru, kehidupan peribadi sebagai pelawak dan selebriti dengan seorang Ustaz.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 23
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 5
programme.desc: Program menarik yang akan menghiburkan anda semua.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 20
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 5
programme.desc: Keluarga miskin berpindah ke kejiranan kaya selepas menjadi jutawan serta merta. Masing-masing cuba untuk hidup sebagai 'orang kaya' mengikut cara mereka sendiri.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 16
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 2
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 16
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 10
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 12
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 15
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories - EP 3
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 13
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 8
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 15
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 18
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Patah Sayap Bertongkat Paruh - EP 1
programme.desc: Aliah pulang ke kampung halaman bersama anak anaknya setelah berpisah dengan Hisyam. Hisyam tidak mahu melepaskan Aliah. Talhah sahabat Aliah dari kecil sentiasa membantu Aliah di kampung.

programme.title: 10 Tips Tipu Bini
programme.desc: Apabila 3 pengarah kreatif di syarikat pengiklanan cuba memikat 3 gadis intern yang bekerja di syarikat mereka untuk dijadikan kekasih, mereka terpaksa menipu isteri mereka untuk melaksanakan niat mereka.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 7
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 1
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 7
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 19
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 13

programme.title: Gantung - EP 3
programme.desc: Gibbs dan Fara bertanding dengan sengitnya untuk memenangi pilihan raya. Manakala Gibbs menyimpan rahsia Tasha yang menghantui, dan Ray dibuli salah seorang atlet di sekolah. Bolehkah dia bertahan?

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 13
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: JMT - EP 4

programme.title: Teroka Lokal Battle - EP 1

programme.title: Pung Pang Rizalman - EP 11

programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 HD - EP 1
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: A suicide bomber loses his memory and has a bomb attached to his heart. It is up to the police officers to prevent this bomb from taking innocent lives. Release Year: 2019 Director: Behzad Khambata

programme.title: CityLights
programme.desc: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems. Release Year: 2014 Director: Hansal Mehta Awards: 7th Mirchi Music Awards

programme.title: Yaara
programme.desc: A group of close friends who ran a ruthless criminal gang when they were young get separated due to several circumstances. When they reunite after many years, it is to help their friend in need. Release Year: 2020 Director: Tigmanshu Dhulia

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: Shaurya unintentionally locks himself inside his new house in an uninhabited high-rise, and finds it hard to survive without water, food and electricity. Release Year: 2016 Director: Vikramaditya Motwane Awards: 7 wins and 13 nominations

programme.title: Baa Baaa Black Sheep
programme.desc: Baa Baaa Black Sheep is a 2018 Indian action comedy film, starring Anupam Kher, Manish Paul, Annu Kapoor, Manjari Phadnis and Kay Kay Menon in a lead roles. Release Year: 2018 Director: Vishwas Paandya

programme.title: Sarkar 3
programme.desc: Gandhi, a real-estate shark, asks for Sarkar's help in a project where residents would lose their homes. However, after Sarkar declines his proposal, he gets involved in several internal conflicts. Release Year: 2017 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Chatrapathi
programme.desc: Shivaji and his family are uprooted from their community in Sri Lanka and wind up as bonded labourers in Visakhapatnam. The situation worsens when his jealous stepbrother enters his life. Release Year: 2023 Director: V. V. Vinayak

programme.title: Vedaa
programme.desc: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings. Release Year: 2024 Director: Nikkhil Advani Awards: 2025 Winner Iconic- Powerpack Performance of the Year- Abhishek Banerjee

programme.desc: A revenue inspector falls in love with a girl but faces problems due to his cowardliness. He is compelled to find a way to prove himself to her father, who wants her to marry a brave man.

programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 50
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 51
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 52
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 78
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 4
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 4
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 4
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 2
programme.desc: His runway shows are steeped in feelings and emotion. Stephane Rolland has chosen bliss as the theme for his new spring-summer 2024 haute couture collection, which also pays tribute to the East.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Les Heros Du Patrimoine - EP 2
programme.desc: France counts 20,000 kilometres of coastline, an exceptional yet fragile marine heritage, both built and natural. Between erosion, rising sea-levels and pollution, the danger threatens on all sides. But everywhere local heroes are fighting back, determined to preserve it, because the ocean is their heritage.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Maitres
programme.desc: In Strasbourg, a law firm specialising in the legal rights of foreigners. Through their tenacity, humour and professionalism, Christine Mengus and Nohra Boukara attempt to find humane solutions when confronted with the injustice of certain situations. They are often the lawyers of last resort...

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 3
programme.desc: Mrs Turcotte continues to try to close the door on her past, but it refuses to leave her in peace.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 4
programme.desc: Remi tries to reconnect with the past by offering Julianne his support when she gives birth, but not everyone approves.

programme.title: La Faune Connectee - EP 1
programme.desc: White nose syndrome has been decimating bats since 2006. At the Lafleche cave, Jade Legros and his team in Quebec track 400 brown bats with transmitters to study their habits. This project aims to better understand and protect this vulnerable species.

programme.title: Jcvd
programme.desc: Fed up with American celebrity, actor Jean-Claude Van Damme returns to Belgium. He leaves behind his tax and marital problems and longs for a new tranquillity. While he is in a post office, an unexpected event thrusts him, despite himself, back into the spotlight.

programme.title: Les Fleurs Sauvages
programme.desc: Over a phone message, a man explains how to use his tractor so that the person on the other end can mow the lawn in his garden in his absence.

programme.title: La Photographe
programme.desc: France, 1936. The German photojournalist Gerta Pohorylle and her partner, the Hungarian photographer Andre Friedmann, had a hard time getting published in the press. When the Spanish Civil War broke out, they were determined to cover the events, under the names of Gerda Taro and Robert Capa.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Glíma, Iceland’s traditional Viking wrestling, is on the brink of extinction. Champion Þórður Ólafsson is fighting to keep the sport alive as participation among young people continues to drop. programme.title: Movie - Pithamagan
programme.desc: A young orphan grows up in a graveyard and is devoid of any human feelings; when he leaves the cemetery and meets people, he experiences emotions for the first time.

programme.title: Movie - Un Samayal Arayil
programme.desc: Kalidasan and Gowri are food lovers who get connected over a wrong phone call. Gradually, they develop feelings for each other but hide their true identities during their face-to-face meeting.

programme.title: Movie - Uyirthiru 420
programme.desc: A conman falls for the girl he was deceiving and decides to work as an honest man. While working in a hotel, he discovers that his boss is being troubled by a high profile man and plans to help him by conning the man.

programme.title: Movie - Vadugapatti Mapillai
programme.desc: When Vadivu's city-based fiance, Vijay, refuses to marry her for her simple looks, her father swears that he'll get them married anyhow. She then changes into the avatar of Jeena and enters his life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Parisu
programme.desc: Sisters Malini and Chitra are heirs to a huge fortune. Chitra is in for a shock when she introduces her boyfriend to Malini and the latter accuses him of raping her years ago.

programme.title: Movie - Taj Mahal
programme.desc: A man sees a woman on her engagement day and they fall for each other. Later, her engagement is broken off due to some circumstances but, the enmity between their villages and family acts as a barrier to their budding relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Gopurangal Saivathillai
programme.desc: Mohan is forced to marry Arukkani, an illiterate village girl. Disappointed, he develops a secret relationship with a modern girl. But problems follow when he repents.

programme.title: Movie - Veera Thalattu
programme.desc: Pandi is a villager who loves his mother beyond words. However, Pandi gets shocked when his uncle reveals that she is not his mother. What happens when Pandi's real mother returns to the village?

programme.title: Movie - Mayie
programme.desc: A man is always protective of the women in his village. One day, he learns that his father has a second wife and gets upset at him. After his father commits suicide, he brings home his stepsister.

programme.title: Movie - Aravaan
programme.desc: Kombodhi is the leader of a tribe, who steals from the rich to survive. He befriends Varupuli, who unknown to Kombodhi is a man who escaped from being sacrificed and is being hunted by his village.

programme.title: Movie - Vaigai
programme.desc: A couple in love survive suicide attempts after the boy's father sends his henchmen to kill the girl. After their separation, he finds her again in the city but things do not work in their favour.

programme.title: Movie - Vaikarai Pookkal
programme.desc: Vellaisamy Gounder is a village chief who is in favour of casteism. He forbids the romantic relationship between Deivanai and the village doctor when the latter refuses to reveal his caste.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Sivasakthi
programme.desc: Sakthi, a police officer, befriends Siva, a smuggler, in order to gain his trust and get evidence against him. But soon, their friendship turns into a genuine one.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 4
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Brentford goalkeepers, Viktor Gyokeres, Callum Hudson-Odoi and Lucas Bergvall.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 2
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Erling Haaland, Iliman Ndiaye, Raúl Jimenez and Amad.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 3
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Bruno Fernandes, William Saliba, Jeremy Doku and Alexis Mac Allister.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. Through exclusive interview

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Agallar vs. Ryan Bow
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! From the shores of sunny Costa Rica Nick Agallar takes on Ryan Bow in a lightweight match-up. Agallar is on the comeback trail as he returns to Costa Rica to fight the 29-year-old Bow.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proska
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features 'GGG' Gennady Golovkin (23-1, 20 KOs) making his American debut defending his WBA and IBO middleweight world titles against Grzegorz 'Super G' Proska (28-1, 21 KOs). The fight took place at Turning Stone Resort and Casino in Verona, New York, USA, on September 1, 2012. Approximately 685,000 tuned in to see Go

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Ricky Hatton
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Floyd Mayweather, Jr., in the final bout before his first retirement from boxing, facing Ricky Hatton in a superfight. Mayweather has referred to Hatton as one of the toughest competitors he has ever had to face. Also on the card, a young Saul (Canelo) Alvarez continues to rise in the rankings.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 3, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan, features Meisei, Tsurugisho, Kotonowaka and Tobizaru.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Juan Diaz
programme.desc: This episode features a lightweight title bout between Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 83
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'squirrel', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different squirrels - grey, red and one with a very bushy tail. Some friends find scampering squirrels, we see a flying one and a supersquirrel wearing a cape! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Messy has a pair of yummy green socks waiting for him. He eats one, but where is the second? He visits OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo join the big cross-town race with plans to win. But how can they stay ahead when they have to keep stopping and swopping to help other racers in trouble?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch wants to watch his favourite DVD in peace, so uses his remote control to pause the Rio Carnival in Brazil!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 48
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: The Heelers gather for a classic Aussie Christmas. Bluey gets a new teddy and introduces him to the whole family, but the family play too rough with him and now he wants to go home, until Frisky convinces him to stay.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Andy encounters some baby Lar Gibbons in Thailand that appear to be flying as they swing through the rainforest.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.desc: The squirrels have to solve the mystery of the missing red ruby.

programme.desc: Sarah and Duck try to work out exactly what it is that Scarf Lady has been busily knitting in her sleep.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 2
programme.desc: Thomas befriends a stray dog who is wandering around the railway and tries to find him a home. In the process, Thomas derails and the fuzzy little dog raises the alarm.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Umbrella gets left on the bus, Sarah and Duck head to the bus depot in search of their friend.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Sarah is fascinated by some mysterious music coming from the hedge.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Unicorns, dragons, mermen, and the tooth fairy! The little animals share their favourite magical creatures.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 13
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran bump into Ned and Monty as they walk along the canal. Ned invites them onboard to go on a boat ride, where JoJo gets to act as captain - on the lookout for treasure!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 1
programme.desc: Norrie skips into the Clubhouse and greets her friends. As they greet her, they reminisce about when they first met.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 52
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn the many ways you can walk with the help of friends and a catchy song.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to GrimHQ. It remains to be seen whether the Go Jetters can fix the glitch.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bouncing and singing Cranberries!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fastest woodwind player - Pear!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato by pretending to be his sidekick and captures him instead.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant floating bubble together.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 84
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 18
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chair', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a brown, a comfy and a high chair, as well as a pushchair. We meet a friend who has a wheelchair and sit at the beach in some deck chairs. The journey is repeated with some surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Messy monster is having breakfast and sees little objects on the fridge. Why don't they fall off? He goes to OKIDO to find out!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Kyan wants to climb Mount Everest, but his daring plan is interrupted by Grandmaster Glitch, who's careering down the mountain in a giant snowball.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 49
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: It's the night before Easter and Bluey and Bingo are worried the Easter bunny is going to forget about them like last year. Mum and Dad reassure the girls but when they wake up to no chocolate eggs, Bingo fears the worst. Luckily Bluey finds a series of clues and a treasure hunt throughout the house begins.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Andy, Jen & Scout head to Patagonia, in South America on a baby animal mission in search of mother puma and her four cubs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Glitch finally pushes the Grimbots too far with his rudeness, prompting them to go on strike. Glitch seeks help from Kyan - but Kyan has his own problems, as he's worried about speaking in front of a crowd for his upcoming show and tell. Glitch thinks of a solution to both their problems: they'll travel to Barney Castle in Ireland, near where his Great Aunt Cliodhna lived, and find the Barney Stone. It is said to give the gift of the gab to all who kiss it, making them brilliant at talking to pe

programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 1
programme.desc: Norrie skips into the Clubhouse and greets her friends. As they greet her, they reminisce about when they first met.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 52
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn the many ways you can walk with the help of friends and a catchy song.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to GrimHQ. It remains to be seen whether the Go Jetters can fix the glitch.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bouncing and singing Cranberries!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fastest woodwind player - Pear!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato by pretending to be his sidekick and captures him instead.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant floating bubble together.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 85
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of 'I Spy' where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 19
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'alien', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We meet lots of different aliens - a green alien with feelers from outer space, a quick one and an alien doing a trick. Dee tries to find a hiding alien, and then Dee and a friend see aliens with different numbers of eyes. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Messy's new friend is in a spot of hot bother! They go on an icy adventure to the South Pole, the desert and the mountains to help.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Somebody stole the big hand off the clock tower. Mojo and Bo are on the case, but it is not as simple as it seems. Soon, they are pulling off a heist they never expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: The Go Jetters head to Scotland in search of the Loch Ness Monster, but Grandmaster Glitch plans to catch Nessie first, if only his Grimbler was up to the job.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 50
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and the team are stuck inside, so Foz reads them his favourite book: Around the World in 80 Days by Jules Verne. The Go Jetters imagine they are characters from the story as they listen to a tale of travel by train, boat and even elephant. Will 'Phileas Foz' and his friends make the trip in time?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Glitch finally pushes the Grimbots too far with his rudeness, prompting them to go on strike. Glitch seeks help from Kyan - but Kyan has his own problems, as he's worried about speaking in front of a crowd for his upcoming show and tell. Glitch thinks of a solution to both their problems: they'll travel to Barney Castle in Ireland, near where his Great Aunt Cliodhna lived, and find the Barney Stone. It is said to give the gift of the gab to all who kiss it, making them brilliant at talking to pe

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 3
programme.desc: A little railway show comes to Sodor and a misunderstanding leads to all the small engines on railway turning up at Ulfstead Castle to participate.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Sarah is fascinated by some mysterious music coming from the hedge.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck spot a patch of garden in the park that needs some care, but can't seem to find a gardener.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Parties, presents, and lots of cake! The animals chat about everything they love about birthdays!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 14
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran run into Jared and Cynthia who are playing basketball. JoJo joins in, but she doesn't feel like she is tall enough to play it well. So they make an adapted version of basketball called 'JoJo Ball' instead!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 2
programme.desc: Snail is thrilled to be moving house as she wishes to escape the wet and sploshy place she currently calls home to a more spacious house on the hill.

Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10

Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12

programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 8
programme.desc: Marty withstands a brutal cold snap to harvest the last of his furs and fly home to his family; Mike carves a narrow road out of a steep ridge near his property to gain access to prime hunting grounds.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Anthony begins with the Yangtze River, down a diversion along the Grand Canal towards Suzhou, and finally to Wuxi.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotised assassins, and a brain-linked cyborg couple. We investigate some of the strangest experiments on record. From two-headed dogs to testicle transplants...

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: All over the world, there are places and objects that are thought to be cursed. Many people avoid these things, believing they will bring harm. Others think that curses are nothing but superstition.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 13
programme.desc: As gator season enters the homestretch, Troy and Pickle chase a hook-breaking monster. Ashley uses a tip from the King of the Swamp to target a giant. Bruce puts it all on the line on his final day.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Forget the monsters under your bed. The real ones, from dinosaurs to mythic beasts, are out there just waiting to be unearthed.

programme.title: Alone (S12) - EP 2
programme.desc: Faced with skittish game and unfamiliar plants, the final group of survivalists quickly learn their earliest strategies will be met with unforgiving resistance.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10) - EP 14
programme.desc: In this special competition, two previous champions go head-to-head in a 5-hour forging round, making their own signature 'can mai' blades for the chance to compete against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 46
programme.desc: A Milwaukee company experiments with something new. What starts as an unappealing low-calorie beer becomes the number one beer in America, sparking a battle between two titans for the crown of light beer.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 47
programme.desc: Before juice was everywhere, these innovators created the most nostalgic drink products and thirst quenchers of the last century, leading the charge on a new billion-dollar beverage industry.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - EP 5
programme.desc: Further investigation has the fellowship suspecting multiple secretive operations took place on Lot 5, possibly related to the Garden Shaft.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - EP 6
programme.desc: After two years of waiting, the team receives the Muon topography data and learns that the cavity known as Aladdin's Cave may have more secrets to tell.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 2
programme.desc: Facing soaring costs, mounting criticism, and a tight deadline, Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 616
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: After the team conducts a simultaneous drone swarm experiment in order to stimulate phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch, they encounter more than what they bargained for.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8) - EP 2
programme.desc: Throughout civilisation there are many mighty empires that have risen, only to one day fall. And for some of them, their demise remains a mystery. What can we discover from clues left behind by them?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil's Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history's darkest stories.

programme.title: Tokyo Legacy
programme.desc: The history of Tokyo, from its devastated state in the aftermath of WWII, rapid development leading to the 1964 Olympics, and finally the global powerhouse on the road to the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 513
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: The action picks up both on the water and off as one of the summer's biggest events descends upon the Lake of the Ozarks: The Shootout powerboat races.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 127
programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead outside a Tulsa home, detectives must sift through murky details to figure out who she is and what happened to her.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25) - EP 495
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Det. White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex. In Gwinnett, a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: Drug Runner Lover
programme.desc: After investigating a drug smuggler for years, police finally receive information that leads to his arrest but he refuses to talk. Police have just 8 hours to identify, locate and arrest the entire ring.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 6
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 5
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 136
programme.desc: A grieving father attacks his 3-year-old son's killer in court; a judge screams expletives at a disruptive member of the gallery; a wheelchair-ridden defendant runs for it before entering court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 137
programme.desc: A defendant announces college baseball scores during his murder trial; a man facing drug charges gets caught smoking marijuana in the virtual courtroom; a domestic violence suspect threatens a judge.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: The Mafia's Manager
programme.desc: Taiwanese police received a tip off that a mysterious manager in the Taiwanese mafia was getting on a flight to Jakarta. They had just 6 hours to identify him to their counterparts in Jakarta.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Det. Walter Edmond responds to a homicide where a woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds, and a couple at the scene leads him to a suspect.

programme.desc: Dubbed 'the vampire killer,' teen Mathew Hardman thought that taking a life would make him immortal. His victim was an elderly neighbour. After stabbing her, he removed her heart and drank her blood.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 1
programme.desc: A 68-year-old father shoots his daughter's boyfriend when the couple arrives at the family home. Believing his daughter is trapped in an abusive relationship, he fires three shots.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 13
programme.desc: Linda grew up in luxury, her parents' Miami mansion meticulously maintained by staff. As a young woman, she worked in high-end real estate and enjoyed the Miami social scene.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 14
programme.desc: After suffering traumatic losses, Linda's life took a drastic turn. Now, at 70, her once-elegant lifestyle has evolved into an existence surrounded by trash and decay.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 10
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.desc: Steven Tari, Papua New Guinea's most notorious cult leader, was charged with multiple accounts of underage rape and murder through his systemic use of 'flower girls' or cannibalistic virgin sacrifices.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: A home invasion results in a man being beaten to death and set on fire. As investigators race to find the perpetrator, a shocking 911 call pits two brothers against each other in the interrogation room.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner’s doorstep; a jeweller locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man dressed as a chicken claims to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 5
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: In an affluent Washington town, a teenage heartbreak spirals into obsession, culminating in a deadly house-party shooting that exposes how jealousy can turn lethal.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bob spent a fabulous career as a successful artist painting and drawing for department store advertising, where his work caught the attention of many celebrities.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Competition for food becomes fierce as lion numbers rise; a lioness risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Paddy and Chris: Road Tripping S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Switzerland to explore its multi-million-pound wellness industry. The lads travel to one of the country's top wellness resorts for a full body MOT to assess how well they're ageing. After a consultation with specialists, they're put through a rigorous training programme that reveals their true biological ages, surprising them both. Paddy, also eager to address his thinning hair, travels to Zurich to a men-only clinic to explore available treatments.

programme.title: Into the Congo with Ben Fogle S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: On this second leg of his journey, Ben heads deeper into the vast Congo wilderness to fulfil his life-long dream of seeing wild gorillas. He discovers a region experiencing rapid change: logging roads have opened-up the rainforest and thousands of people are flooding in to seek their fortunes. It's a threat to traditional communities who rely on the rainforest - but also its stunning wildlife.

programme.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Robson Green goes to a tiny collection of islands in the far south-western corner of the Pacific Ocean, in search of flame snapper, giant trevally and croissants.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Competition for food becomes fierce as lion numbers rise; a lioness risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: For his latest Railway Adventure Nick is in Romania, undertaking a journey he's dubbed 'The Transylvania Express'.

programme.title: Gordon Buchanan: My Epic Camel Adventure S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan takes an epic camel ride across the Gobi Desert to discover how these most iconic, yet least understood, animals have adapted to survive in extreme environments.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Competition for food becomes fierce as lion numbers rise; a lioness risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Chris Packham tells the miraculous story of how plant life turned Earth from a barren rock into a vibrant green world - a four-billion year saga of extraordinary highs and lows that almost wiped out all life on the planet. Beginning as a water world without land masses, a giant asteroid bombardment triggered Earth's plate tectonics, leading to huge fungi, soil and giant swamp forests. But the early plants locked so much carbon dioxide that global temperatures suddenly plunged.

programme.title: Gordon Buchanan: My Epic Camel Adventure S01 - EP 1

programme.desc: Guy explores Vietnam's fields and factories to see how the single-party state is also fast becoming an industrial powerhouse and the world's next high-tech workshop.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Africa - home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, wildlife faces huge challenges.

programme.desc: In northern Guangdong, majestic mountain ranges are home to a dazzling array of wildlife; Silver Pheasants, Chinese Pangolins, Black Kites, Chinese Giant Salamanders, and an entirely new species of cave gecko.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Umbria, nicknamed the green heart of Italy. From wild boar hunts to incredible black truffle farms, Tucci explores the riches this land has to offer.

programme.title: The Secret Genius of Modern Life S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Our 2300 miles of motorway are the backbone of the country and without them, we'd probably all grind to a halt. Hannah takes a drive to the National Highways control centre for the UK's busiest motorway to meet the team that keep these super-roads running 24/7.

programme.title: Paddy and Chris: Road Tripping S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Switzerland to explore its multi-million-pound wellness industry. The lads travel to one of the country's top wellness resorts for a full body MOT to assess how well they're ageing. After a consultation with specialists, they're put through a rigorous training programme that reveals their true biological ages, surprising them both. Paddy, also eager to address his thinning hair, travels to Zurich to a men-only clinic to explore available treatments.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Chris Packham tells the miraculous story of how plant life turned Earth from a barren rock into a vibrant green world - a four-billion year saga of extraordinary highs and lows that almost wiped out all life on the planet. Beginning as a water world without land masses, a giant asteroid bombardment triggered Earth's plate tectonics, leading to huge fungi, soil and giant swamp forests. But the early plants locked so much carbon dioxide that global temperatures suddenly plunged.

programme.desc: There is a deadly outbreak of a fatal disease and people are determined to keep it at bay.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1 - EP 1177
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Maverick joins forces with a lady gambler to enter a Winner-Takes-All poker game.

programme.title: The Good Liar
programme.desc: A career con man sets his sights on his latest mark - a recently widowed woman, worth millions. But as the two draw closer, what should have been another simple swindle takes on the ultimate stakes.

programme.title: Boycott
programme.desc: A HBO Original movie based on the 13-month boycott of the use of bus services in Alabama after a black woman refuses to give up her seat to a white man.

programme.title: In Pursuit Of Honor
programme.desc: Don Johnson leads a group of men in the fight to save the cavalry's last horses from slaughter.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: Neo, Morpheus and Trinity prepare for a final battle against vicious machines set to invade Zion.

programme.title: The Matrix Resurrections
programme.desc: The long-awaited fourth film in the groundbreaking action franchise, reuniting Keanu Reeves and Carrie-Anne Moss, returns to a world of two realities - one, everyday life; the other, what lies behind it.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 107
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.desc: 23andMe Institute CEO Anne Wojcicki. Emily meets 23andMe Institute Chief Executive Officer Anne Wojcicki for a discussion of the rise, fall and rebirth of the personal genetics company.
