programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang sits down with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei in a wide-ranging interview discussing his San Francisco roots, the race against OpenAI, the Pentagon standoff and AI’s endgame.

programme.title: Are Bots Killing Online Poker?
programme.desc: Computers have outplayed humans in chess and Go for decades. But poker was long considered unhackable—until bots from Russia and elsewhere got in the game.

programme.title: Inside Jeffrey Epstein's Network of Power
programme.desc: Jeffrey Epstein built a network of elites across finance, politics and academia. By analyzing thousands of documents, Bloomberg mapped its reach and how it widened even as allegations against him accumulated.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies. The biz p

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 136
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 75 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: EMISSARY - EP 16
programme.desc: Jiang Dawei, an idealistic student turned police officer, goes undercover to infiltrate a drug lord's inner circle. As he gathers evidence, his personality drastically changes, causing rifts with loved ones. He endures isolation and hardship to fulfill his duty.

programme.title: Deadly Sins & What's On Today - EP 8
programme.desc: Exploring the darker side of human nature when desire spirals out of control, this drama revolves around the East New Territories Regional Crime Unit, which investigates a series of bizarre murder cases and uncovers shocking secrets.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2846
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Journey to Jianghu (SR.2)
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Reading ten thousand books is not as good as traveling ten thousand miles." Wayne Lai and Mak Cheung-ching embark on another journey, continuing their exploration of the magnificent landscapes depicted in Jin Yong's novels and delving into the martial arts world of Chinese history. They travel along the Yangtze and Yellow River basins, traversing Sichuan, Zhejiang, Henan, and Shanxi provinces, climbing Mount Emei's Golden Summit, visiting Baidi City, the Yue Fei Temple in Zh

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 39
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 30
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 6
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: Communion - EP 14
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels. The duo’s little son Au Ka-kin (Chow Ka Lok) signs up for Greater Bay Area Youth Entrepreneurship Co

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 19
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 20
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him. programme.title: You Light Me Up - EP 1
programme.desc: You Light Me Up begins with a power outage disrupting the daily routines of three ordinary people. To earn a living, optimistic young guy Chow Kong-hong (Chow Ka Lok), down and out female scriptwriter Lai Sheung-man (Kaman Kong) and irritable Cheng Chung (Timothy Cheng) coincidentally become food couriers. Each of the trio has their ambition, but they find themselves in dire straits due to some power outage. While prospects are uncertain, the trio find out there is astonishingly a miraculous lig

programme.title: Relic Of An Emissary - EP 1
programme.desc: The founder and first emperor of the Ming Dynasty CHU YUEN-CHEUNG has passed away. CHU WAN-MAN (Chan Shan Chung), who is the son of his designated heir, is made his successor. MAN’s bodyguard NGO SIU-FUNG (Michael Tse) is ordered to search for CHEUNG’s lost will. In the course of his investigation, he gets to know the Prince of Yin CHU TAI’s (Joe Ma) counselor MA SAM-PO (Sammul Chan). FUNG and PO appreciate each other, but FUNG reminds himself not to drop his guard, as TAI is coveting the throne

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 24
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. programme.title: Provocateur - EP 25
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. His secretary CHAN HEI-MAN (Ali Lee) also has a very high regard for SIU-KIT after he joins the c

programme.title: Let's Have a Baby
programme.desc: De Sheng and Wan Jun have been married for years, but are unable to conceive. Wan Jun decides to undergo artificial insemination in the States and finally gets pregnant. She meets her cousin from the States who stays temporarily in their house with them, and De Sheng begins to suspect that they are having an affair…

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: During World War II, a singer was raped and killed by Master Tao during her escape, with all her valuables stolen as well. Since then, the Tao’s house became haunted. Years later, Master Tao’s descendant sells the house to a young couple to pay off a massive gambling debt, but the couple soon discover that it is haunted by the vengeful spirit...

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh II
programme.desc: Bodyguard Ah Sun is sent to protect his boss' son, only to meet and fall in love with his mistress, the gorgeous Joey. As love blossoms between the two, the powerful boss finds out and all hell breaks loose!

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister’s daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man…

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Final Justice (1988)
programme.desc: Chang is a brilliant police inspector, but his maverick ways have put him at odds with both his superiors and peers. When he encounters Wai, a streetwise car thief who accidentally becomes the key to tracking down a gang of armed bank robbers, the two form an uneasy alliance to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: 36 Secrets of Courtship
programme.desc: This erotic comedy features three lotharios who vie to become principal of the Macho Man Training School -- an extremely sexy institution dedicated to extremely non Shaolin-types of physical exertion.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: After provoking the son of a local tyrant, young Wong Fei Hung is sent by his father to train under Drunken Master Beggar So. When his father uncovers the tyrant's plot to sell mines to the Japanese, he becomes a target for assassination. To save his father and stop the sale, Fei Hung must forge his own "Drunken Fist" style to defeat the killers.

programme.title: Fight Back to School
programme.desc: SDU officer Chow Sing Sing goes undercover at a school to locate a missing gun. With his partner Tat, he successfully recovers the weapon, only to stumble upon a munitions smuggling ring. In retaliation, the smugglers storm the school and take students hostage, forcing Sing to risk everything to save them.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: I Love Lolanto
programme.desc: Lolanto, a playboy, is injured and meets the daughter of a tycoon, Man, in the hospital. Man is mentally retarded and makes friends easily with Lolanto hence Man’s father hires him to take care of her. However, as Man goes through treatments and recovers, her feelings for Lolanto also changes…

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: After the Sino-Japanese war, Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man and his family experience hardship in their hometown and eventually moved to Hong Kong for a new life. He wants to open a martial arts school in Hong Kong, but first he must pass and win the challenges put forth by the local martial arts grandmasters.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from a famous Japanese manga. 18-year-old Takumi delivers tofu in his father's near-obsolete car every day and becomes a good racer with perfect drifting skill. Encouraged by his father, he joins a mountain race and unexpectedly wins it, making him famous overnight and leading him from one exciting race to another.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Justice, My Foot!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husband's death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served.

programme.title: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: An old lady died after mysteriously falling off a building and her ghost appears to haunt the place. This freaked out the security guards, who invite ghostbuster Leo and his female assistant to help. In the process, Leo finds out that the old lady was killed by her son and daughter in law. To rest her soul, Leo promises to bring the couple to justice.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei’s possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Lawyer Yip defends a rapist and gets him acquitted. Yip’s boyfriend Fong, a police inspector, knows he is guilty and despises Yip for not upholding justice. The victim’s sister takes revenge by spiking the rapist’s drink but is raped instead. This puts the rapist back in court. Will Yip choose to uphold law or justice this time?

programme.title: The Stormriders
programme.desc: Driven by prophecy, Lord Conqueror murders Wind and Cloud's parents, then raises the boys as his own. Years later, their power rivals his, so he secretly plots their deaths. However, when his daughter falls for both young men, jealousy ignites. The moment he betroths her to Wind, a fatal battle becomes inevitable.

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone Strikes Again
programme.desc: In this hilarious sequel, Mr Big Potato opens an old-fashioned Chinese clinic, but his traditional methods are rejected by the sceptics of modern Hong Kong. Enter his buddy Mr Funny bone to rescue his business!

programme.title: Black Magic
programme.desc: Hsu Lo is up against an evil black magic practitioner San Kan Mi, who wants to place a death spell on him and a love spell on his fiancee Wang Chu Ying. Fortunately, Wang's friends manage to find another veteran witch doctor to take on the evil San. This bone-chilling tale of good versus evil races to a heart-stopping ending.

programme.title: The Happiest Moment
programme.desc: This erotic comedy anthology features three stories about an old man who dies from an overdose of virility pills, a cop who goes on the run after extorting money from a hooker, and a barber's apprentice who encounters a lively corpse in a night vigil. Through playing all these characters, Michael Hui proves himself as a genius of Hong Kong comedy.

programme.title: Till the End of Time
programme.desc: Ming marries singer Ling, defying his wealthy father and severing family ties. When Ling becomes pregnant, Ming's overwork causes him to lose his sight. To support their home, Ling returns to the stage but Ming leaves to avoid becoming a burden. Encouraged by a friend, Ling performs again, and her song moves Ming to reunite with his wife and child.

programme.title: The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: This side-splitting comedy sees naive Ah Niu headed to Hong Kong, where he is repeatedly exploited and taken advantage of, and eventually finds himself arrested and imprisoned! Can he survive difficult times and finally overcome adversity?

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: Fa is an obsessive man who loves his wife Ah Hsia but is easily jealous and abuses her. When she leaves him one day, Fa hooks up with another woman, Hsing. A deadly triangle develops when Fa runs into Ah Hsia again and decides to win her back...

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: Renowned martial arts clan heir Yuan Ying Fei hires four down-and-out martial artists to eliminate the local escort agency's young chief, Guan Yuan. Unexpectedly, the four befriend Guan instead. When Yuan's conspiracy leads to Guan's death, they unite to avenge him.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him?

programme.title: The Iron Buddha
programme.desc: After a notorious rapist Xiao kills his master and the entire clan, Han the last surviving disciple, decides to take revenge. He must find the legendary Hulong Blade to counter Xiao's Evil Poisonous Sword, but as Han has never seen Xiao before, he is deceived when Xiao poses as an ally to try and steal his Blade in the process.

programme.title: The Mirror and the Lichee
programme.desc: The curious title in this Huangmei Opera romance refers to the two props that signal a happy beginning between a scholar and a local beauty. The scholar polishes mirrors so as to be closer to his love, who signals her approval by tossing him some lichees. From that point on the course of their love becomes rocky, complete with murder and suicide.

programme.title: Killers Five
programme.desc: The Duke's daughter has been kidnapped by the notorious Golden Dragon Hill bandits. A swordman named Yue Zhen Bei is assigned to save her, and expecting many dangers on the journey, Yue garners help from a group of good friends who are also kung fu masters.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master "Shadow Whip", he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to "Shadow Whip"?

programme.title: Princess Iron Fan
programme.desc: Tang San Zang and his disciples are halted by the Flaming Mountains, where only Princess Iron Fan's fan can quench the fire. Refused help by the Bull Demon King and his wife, Sun Wukong must outwit them to obtain it. After crossing, they fall into a trap set by the White Bone Demon sisters, and Wukong must use his powers to save his master.

programme.title: Vengeance
programme.desc: Yu Lou is betrayed by his wife and eventually killed by her lover, Fung, who is the boss of a martial arts school. Yu Lou's brother, Xiao Lou, knows about his tragic death and is determined to take revenge for him.

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates. When she has to choose one of them to marry, how will Fei E tell them that she is a girl? To complicate matters, a girl who Fei E saves one day only wants to be married to her!

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this "young" auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: The Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung is a group of anti-Ching martial artists who have killed a Ching official. Years later, when five disciples and descendants of Ten Tigers meet one night, one of them is killed by the son of the late Ching official who returns with a vengeance. They must fight against him to protect the Ten Tigers clan...

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: To rule the martial arts world, the Head of the Snake Sect seeks to possess a deadly plant called "Five Poison Web", spreading rumours on its whereabouts. Brothers Xiong and Kit are sent to investigate. Xiong falls in love with Su who has a clue of where the plant is, but she accidentally hurts Kit when seeking the plant, devastating Xiong.

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li's wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li's Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother's death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: A rich girl Yue Ying, together with her maid Chun Lan, encounter a poor scholar Bian Ji at a fête. Chun Lan realizes Yue Ying is in love with him, but mixes his identity with a bandit due to an old servant's confusion, threatening the couple's union. After a series of complications, misunderstandings and mismatches, Chun Lan finally saves the day.

programme.title: The Scandalous Warlord
programme.desc: General Feng occupies the city of Shandong, and soldiers and civilians alike welcome him without knowing his tyrannical and lustful nature. His first official business is to inspect the brothels and take the prostitutes home to become his concubines. Feng is finally killed by his officers, but will the new general rule the city differently?

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: In this Opera epic, a loyal Imperial Court servant gives up his own newborn son to save the prince from an evil official.

programme.title: Heroes Shed No Tears
programme.desc: Kao Chien Fei is a young swordsman who wields a special sword with a teardrop marked on its blade. He is charged with averting an impending crisis in the martial arts world, but the villain, Zhou Tung Lai, wishes to become the ruler in the martial arts world, and launches a scheme to pit the various heroes against one another.

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: Peter was a key dancer in a dance troupe and applied to be the chauffeur of a rich girl, Betty. When he is rumoured to be her lover, Betty is furious and goes undercover as a reporter to investigate the rumour. They fall in love in the process, and after putting Peter through many tests, they finally seal their love with a dance.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Li Cheng Ying's father was set up and killed by his old friend Ling Hao. Li, who has learnt "Shaolin Hand Lock" from his father, is on a mission to avenge his death. He works as an undercover guard at Ling's house where he meets his long-lost brother, and the two team up to take revenge for their father against Ling.

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Two teenage girls make a pledge to look after each other in a small Chinese fishing town, where the notions of women's rights or sexual freedom are absent. One ends up happily married to a stranger, while the other is cruelly betrothed to the abusive son of a wealthy family and has to seek to free herself from the situation.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge. Host Hu Gua, co-host Sandra and the elite challengers will stay together, built up a whole new competition between te

programme.title: Actors On The Tour
programme.desc: The reality variety show "Actors On The Tour," guided by hosts Allison Lin and Fandy Fan , will invite an actor to travel alongside them. Through the guest's travel itinerary, the program aims to delve into the diverse charm of travel, challenging familiar perspectives and relishing the joy of entirely new travel experiences.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 28
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 34
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Time Concert 2024 - EP 5
programme.desc: After 20 years, the Girls are back on stage! "Time Concert 2024" revives nostalgic melodies, celebrating two decades of music with a dazzling showcase and a competition for the top hits of the era!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 29
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 3
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls 'father' is actually her real parents' enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 4
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls 'father' is actually her real parents' enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 489
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 15
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 23
programme.desc: The story follows two people who found Muay Thai in their ordinary lives and begin to understand the value of life. After going through countless blows, injuries, self-doubts and other ups and downs, they finally achieved their own dreams!

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 3
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls 'father' is actually her real parents' enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 4
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls 'father' is actually her real parents' enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 225
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 24
programme.desc: The story follows two people who found Muay Thai in their ordinary lives and begin to understand the value of life. After going through countless blows, injuries, self-doubts and other ups and downs, they finally achieved their own dreams!

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 490
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 16
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 101
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 35
